overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing an armored character walking through a snowy mountain pass toward ancient stone ruins. The scene features falling snow, dramatic rock formations, and a large stone archway bridge in the distance under a pale winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path between rocky cliffs approaching ancient stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward the stone archway bridge, carrying a large round shield on their back

entered.detail: ancient stone bridge with large central arch and broken pillars, covered in snow
tall dark rock formation with steep faces and patches of snow
distant mountain peaks covered in thick snow against the pale sky
single standing stone column rising near the bridge structure
fallen logs and broken wooden structures partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy mountain pass flanked by rocky cliffs on the left and distant snow-capped peaks on the right. Falling snow drifts down steadily as the character approaches an ancient stone archway bridge with a tall standing pillar visible in the distance. The path is covered in deep snow with scattered rocks and wooden debris lining the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain pass that gradually reveals the scale of ancient ruins. It begins with the character navigating a narrow path flanked by towering rocky cliffs on the left and distant snow-capped peaks on the right. As the character advances through deep snow and scattered wooden debris, the steady drift of falling snow frames the journey. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive stone archway bridge in the distance, with the camera tracking forward toward a solitary standing pillar that looms over the winter landscape.
